likes: I just like the policies and SOPs of the company good platform for new comers   but somewhere I feel that few of the managers are still have immature kind of mentality which they use for taking revenge and they do misuse of their powers of their post. Otherwise company is good and staff is awesome to work together.
dislikes:
What I dislike is few managers unnecessarily using their post's  power for their own purpose or benefits and stop u to grow beyond in the company. And also u can't go up directly coz its kinda chain,  if u break the chain, u have disobeyed or didn't follow the hierarchy and because of this u will be noticed and this behaviour of yours will already  put u in 50% of doubt that only u must be wrong and rest of 50%,....  the managers completes this task to get u out of the company by giving false statement and making false reports. 
Secondly you have no access to the area where you can write a complain online to the management. 
Thirdly, you have no mail I'd of yours or no any other source of communication to express your problem to the Senior secretly. 
Fourth,  manually attendance is preferred instead of digital figure punching. Due to this they gives threat and sometimes if they forgot they mark u absent. 
Fifth, no any place to check your records online like attendance, leaves, number of working days, salary slip nothing u can check there. U only get to know when the salary comes. 
And then start fighting for those mistakes and at the end just because of managers mistake u will get deducted salary and it will take 3-4 months to resolve the attendance issue at last after defeating urself u have to say. Just leave it its a matter of one day.
